compile_risks: Android Gradle Plugin 8.11.2 may require modern Gradle/JDK support.
SQLDelight 1.5.5 with Kotlin 2.2.20 may need compatibility verification.
integration_risks: Exported activity aliases must be reviewed before embedding or exposing integration actions.
External text import accepts ACTION_SEND, ACTION_EDIT, ACTION_VIEW, AUTO_SEND.
FSAF dependency name is intentionally hostile/upstream naming; review vendor policy before public productization.
Release signing reads KSTOREFILE/KSTOREPWD/KEYALIAS/KEYPWD environment variables.
allowBackup=true may be acceptable for vanilla notes app but should be policy-reviewed.
safe_properties: Database schema is simple and local.
